title: God-module decomposition risk
description: Single file mixes cloud sync domain logic and persistence side effects
mitigation: Introduce façade and extract modules incrementally with parity tests
validation needed before migration: Golden transaction fixture comparisons before and after extraction

title: Transaction reconciliation drift
description: Update/delete paths reconcile stock due credit and audit records with complex branching
mitigation: Isolate reconciliation engine and add deterministic tests
validation needed before migration: Replay historical update/delete scenarios and compare state snapshots

title: Sale settlement mismatch
description: Cash online credit split may diverge if API contracts flatten semantics
mitigation: Define explicit settlement contract and schema versioning
validation needed before migration: Validate mixed payment and credit scenarios

title: Return mode behavior regression
description: Four return handling modes affect refund channels and due/store credit differently
mitigation: Encode return mode matrix tests and migration invariants
validation needed before migration: Manual + automated matrix for each mode and customer due state

title: Stock bucket identity break
description: Variant color key normalization must remain stable across all flows
mitigation: Freeze key generation rules and map to backend contract
validation needed before migration: Round-trip tests for variant/color stock updates and returns

title: Event synchronization race
description: Custom events plus storage events may produce stale UI race conditions
mitigation: Move to typed data hooks and normalized store subscription layer
validation needed before migration: Stress test rapid writes and tab synchronization

title: Cloud write guard bypass in migration
description: Online auth hydrated store preconditions currently enforced in client + rules
mitigation: Replicate guards in backend middleware and preserve rules until cutover
validation needed before migration: Negative tests for unverified or unauthenticated writes

title: Rules parity loss
description: Current owner verified gating may be weakened during backend extraction
mitigation: Create explicit authz policy document and middleware tests

title: Legacy schema blind spot
description: Scripts reference legacy products schemas in addition to subcollections
mitigation: Inventory all schema variants and decide migration support policy
validation needed before migration: Run verification scripts and document live usage

title: Cloudinary endpoint ambiguity
description: Dual handlers may diverge across environments
mitigation: Select canonical endpoint strategy and deprecate duplicate path

title: Finance shift close inaccuracies
description: Cash session close computes totals from multiple data sources with correction overlays
mitigation: Extract pure finance calculator module and freeze formulas

title: Import pipeline data corruption
description: Bulk imports can mutate many entities and rely on strict validation assumptions
mitigation: Add dry-run mode and row-level audit output in migration tools
validation needed before migration: Test malformed and edge-case import files

title: Procurement lineage break
description: Inquiry confirmed purchase receipt lineage must remain intact
mitigation: Define immutable lineage ids and enforce in backend model

title: Large page refactor regression
description: Massive component state and handlers increase accidental behavior drift risk
mitigation: Refactor by hook extraction without behavior change first
validation needed before migration: UI regression checklist and snapshot tests

title: Telemetry side-effect changes
description: Fetch/XHR monkey patch behavior may change under Next.js runtime boundaries
mitigation: Replace with explicit instrumentation layer in client boundary
validation needed before migration: Verify network logging coverage and error capture

title: Auth onboarding behavior mismatch
description: Generic responses and verification resend/login interplay may break user flow parity
mitigation: Document auth UX contract before backend split

title: Do-not-break report output drift
description: External users depend on export column and format expectations
mitigation: Version report schemas and compare generated artifacts
validation needed before migration: Golden file diff tests for exports

title: Store bootstrap missing in new backend
description: Current system auto-initializes store document for verified login
